name: satori
short_description: This game is a multi-ending horror game set in Japan. The story branches based on the player's choices, leading to different endings.
detailed_description:
This game is a multi-ending horror game set in Japan.
The story branches based on the player's choices, leading to different endings.

Story

This game is inspired by the Satori, a mythical creature from Japanese folklore with the ability to read people's minds.
Its power serves as a key element that creates fear and mystery.

As the player explores eerie shrines and dimly lit mansions,
they must uncover the hidden secrets within.
Will you be able to reach the truth of this strange world?

Gameplay

The game focuses on puzzle-solving elements and branching storylines.

A single choice may have a significant impact on your fate.

Streaming & Let’s Play Videos

We welcome gameplay videos and live streams.

A Request

The developer of this game is a first-time creator and a high school student with no professional experience.

There may be some rough edges, but we would greatly appreciate your understanding.
